semanticCore: Gathering, enveloping, loading ship, full moon, or stack
quranicRelevance: Night and what it gathers/envelops (Wasaqa - 'wal-layli wa-ma wasaqa').

keyDerivations.meaning: To gather, envelop, carry, wrap up, load a cargo, or stack together
Camel-load cargo, grain volume unit, or stack

figurativeOrRareUsages: وَاللَّيْلِ وَمَا وَسَقَ (84:17): And by the night and what it gathers/envelops (gathering animals and darkness under its shroud).
summaryEn: The root represents gathering and loading (Wasq), swearing by the night shroud that gathers (Wasaqa) and envelops all creatures under its dark cover.
summaryAr: يمثل هذا الجذر جمع المتفرقات وحملها وتغطيتها بالظلام (وسق)، مقسماً بالليل وما يجمعه ويضمه تحت عباءته السوداء من الدواب والظلام (وما وسق).
rawText: وَسِيقَةٌ A mob of driven cattle: see سَيِّقَهٌ and مِعْتَاقٌ. وَسْقٌ A camel's load: see وِقْرٌ.
